message:
fix(host): guard ExponentialBackoff against NaN and zero-initial edge cases

Add two safety checks to ExponentialBackoff::current_delay():
1. Return initial delay immediately when initial duration is zero
   (prevents 0.0 * multiplier producing unexpected results)
2. If the computed delay_ms is NaN (from overflow or exotic float
   arithmetic), clamp to self.max rather than propagating garbage

Also updates supervisor config round-trip test to compare against the
source config values instead of magic numbers.

Remove crates/fcp-sdk/src/ratelimit_bug_test.rs — this was a one-off
debugging harness for a rate-limit atomicity bug, not a real test file.
The bug it was investigating has been fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
